item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Stalking Prevention Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Stalking Prevention

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal stalking prevention legislation in the 119th Congress addressing technology-facilitated stalking, cross-jurisdictional enforcement gaps, and victim-services infrastructure.

What does it actually do?

  • AirTag/tracker-class device misuse provisions
  • Cross-jurisdictional enforcement coordination
  • Victim-notification infrastructure
  • Tribal-court coordination

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #8 Defense Klaus (For Someone You Love survivor-class infrastructure), #9 Rally Group (technology-facilitated abuse safeguards open question), VAWA Reauthorization Bounty Poster.
